import pandas as pd

def process_sales(df):
    df["total"] = df.apply(lambda row: row["quantity"] * row["unit_price"], axis=1)
    df["tax"] = df.apply(lambda row: row["total"] * 0.08, axis=1)
    df["discount_pct"] = df.apply(lambda row: 0.1 if row["total"] > 100 else 0.0, axis=1)
    df["final"] = df.apply(lambda row: row["total"] - row["total"] * row["discount_pct"], axis=1)
    return df

def categorize_age(df):
    df["age_group"] = df.apply(
        lambda row: "senior" if row["age"] >= 65 else "adult" if row["age"] >= 18 else "minor",
        axis=1,
    )
    return df
